rule_name: Multiple failed authentications followed by successful login from anomalous geolocation
description: 47 failed authentication attempts originating from 185.220.101.42 over a 3 minute window targeting distinct user accounts, followed by a successful authentication on j.alvarez from the same source IP. User typically authenticates from 10.20.30.0/24 (Dubai office subnet). No prior VPN session from this geo for this user in the last 90 days.
raw_log_excerpt: May 16 06:17:23 vpn-gw-01 sshd[18432]: Accepted password for j.alvarez from 185.220.101.42 port 51284 ssh2
